confidence_notes: All skills extracted from concrete work experience at Stripe, Plaid, and LinkedIn internship. Each skill is corroborated by specific project/job responsibilities. Self-reported skills section validated against job descriptions.

projects.name: Distributed Rate-Limiting System (Stripe)
projects.summary: Designed and implemented distributed rate-limiting system handling 120,000 RPS in production, supporting $4B+ in annual transactions on Billing API.

projects.name: Bank Connection Ingestion Pipeline (Plaid)
projects.summary: Built production ETL pipeline processing 2M+ daily bank connections using Celery and RabbitMQ, with 99.99% uptime SLA.

projects.name: PostgreSQL Migration (Plaid)
projects.summary: Migrated 8 production services from PostgreSQL 11 to 14 with zero-downtime using logical replication, ensuring continuity for transaction aggregation service.

projects.name: LinkedIn Learning Recommendation Engine (LinkedIn)
projects.summary: Built backend features for recommendation engine with A/B testing instrumentation running experiments on 500,000 daily active users.

impact_highlights.description: Designed distributed rate-limiting system at Stripe handling peak traffic for payment processing platform.
Optimized Stripe Billing API latency through profiling and Go hot-path rewrites.
impact_highlights.metric: Reduced P99 latency from 380ms to 95ms (75% improvement)

impact_highlights.description: Built production ETL pipeline at Plaid processing bank connections at scale.
Maintained core transaction aggregation service with industry-leading reliability.
Ran A/B testing experiments on LinkedIn Learning recommendation engine.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All 12 skills directly corroborated by specific job responsibilities and technical implementations. No aspirational skills included. Experience spans 6+ years at top-tier companies with clear evidence of deployment and production impact.
